prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约17328→16532→61204（2023年异常断档）→27577→25742。排除2023年异常值后，近两年位次稳定在2.5万–2.8万区间；2025年基准约25742名，较2024年回升约1800名，显示报考热度有所恢复；该校在安徽物理类计划2021年33人、2022年31人、2023年28人、2024年26人、2025年22人，呈逐年缩减趋势；2026年计划23人，较2025年增加1人，小幅扩招约4.5%，对竞争略有缓解但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北师范大学为教育部直属211、双一流建设高校；2026年软科中国大学排名第48位，在师范类院校中仅次于北师大、华东师大，近年排名稳中有升（2021年第49→2022年第44→2023年第53→2024年第46→2025年第45→2026年第48），整体处于全国前50强；2026年声誉评价为偏正面，主要源于硕士报考热度高（2026年拟招硕士3100人，报考预估破1.5万），教育学领域人气旺盛；抖音热度总排名第67位（一般），但在2024年报考季曾跃升至第13位（高热），显示周期性关注度较高；未见明显投档断档记录；拥有6个A-及以上学科：世界史A+、教育学A+、马克思主义理论A+、统计学A、生态学A-、生物学A-。物理类招生专业中，化学（师范）对应化学学科（虽未单独评级但属基础理学）、计算机类对应计算机科学与技术（B+级）、地理科学类对应地理学（B+级），学科实力在211高校中处于前列。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育大类2024年热度指数55.84（分化观望），较2023年小幅降温；计算机类热度指数67.8（推荐/偏热），电子信息/通信76.86（高热推荐），相关工科专业仍具吸引力。安徽省2026年高考总报名约45.1万人，较2025年约46.2万人减少约1.1万人，竞争略有缓解；东北师范大学位于吉林省长春市，距安徽较远，属跨省报考；该校在安徽招生规模适中（物理类20余人），近年招生计划先缩后稳，2026年小幅扩招，对安徽考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次25742名、2026年物理类计划小幅扩招约4.5%（扩招使位次数字增大）、学校声誉偏正面、安徽省考生总数略有减少等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025年略有后移（竞争略加剧）。预测最低位次约26464名，区间25964–26964名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 17328 → 16532 → 61204 (abnormal gap in 2023) → 27577 → 25742. Excluding the 2023 anomaly, the ranking has stabilized in the 25,000–28,000 range in recent two years; the 2025 baseline is about 25742, an increase of about 1800 compared to 2024, indicating a recovery in application popularity; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui was 33 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 26 in 2024, and 22 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend; the 2026 plan is 23, an increase of 1 from 2025, a slight expansion of about 4.5%, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 48th, second only to Beijing Normal University and East China Normal University among normal universities, with a stable upward trend in recent years (49th in 2021 → 44th in 2022 → 53rd in 2023 → 46th in 2024 → 45th in 2025 → 48th in 2026), overall in the national top 50; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive, mainly due to high popularity in master's degree applications (2026 planned to recruit 3100 master's students, with estimated applications exceeding 15,000), and strong interest in the field of education; Douyin popularity ranks 67th overall (average), but surged to 13th (high heat) during the 2024 application season, indicating periodic high attention; no obvious file-dropping records; it has 6 disciplines rated A- or above: World History A+, Education A+, Marxist Theory A+, Statistics A, Ecology A-, Biology A-. Among the majors in the Physics Category, Chemistry (Teacher Training) corresponds to Chemistry (though not separately rated, it is a basic science), Computer Class corresponds to Computer Science and Technology (B+ level), and Geography Science Class corresponds to Geography (B+ level), with academic strength among the top in 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Normal/Education category had a popularity index of 55.84 in 2024 (differentiated and wait-and-see), slightly cooling compared to 2023; Computer class popularity index 67.8 (recommended/slightly hot), Electronics/Communication 76.86 (highly recommended), related engineering majors remain attractive. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Anhui Gaokao is about 451,000, a decrease of about 11,000 from about 462,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition; Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, far from Anhui, making it a cross-province application; the university's enrollment scale in Anhui is moderate (over 20 in Physics Category), with enrollment plans first shrinking then stabilizing in recent years, and a slight expansion in 2026, which has some appeal to Anhui candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 25742, the slight expansion of about 4.5% in the 2026 Physics Category plan (expansion increases the ranking number), the slightly positive reputation of the university, and the slight decrease in the total number of candidates in Anhui Province, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be slightly lower than in 2025 (competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is about 26464, with a range of 25964–26964.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Lu Jiaxi Experimental Class) (Teacher Training)
- Chemistry (Teacher Training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Physics Class (including Physics (Teacher Training), Electronic Information Science and Technology, Materials Physics)
- Computer Class (including Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Educational Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Geography Science Class (including Geography Science (Teacher Training), Geographic Information Science, Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning)
- Environmental Science and Engineering Class (including Environmental Science, Environmental Engineering, Ecology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 26464, range 25964–26964. If your ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Computer Class and Physics Class as main targets, Tier 1 Mathematics Experimental Class and Chemistry as sprint goals, and Tier 3 Geography Science Class and Environmental Class as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<25964), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 2177 → 2405 → 3974 → 3254 → 4564. Overall, there is a fluctuating and backward-moving trend. In the past three years, the ranking moved from about 3254 to 4564, a cumulative backward shift of about 1300 places. The 2025 baseline is about 4564, a drop of about 1300 places compared to 2024, a significant decline. The university's enrollment plan in Anhui for liberal arts/history category was 15 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 20 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 26, an increase of 6 from 2025, an expansion rate of 30%, the largest increase in recent years, which significantly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a directly affiliated 211 and Double First-Class university under the Ministry of Education. In 2026, it ranked 48th in the Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top three in normal universities, with a stable ranking in the top 50 in recent years. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive, with high popularity for master's degree applications (vigorous popularity in the education field), boosting the overall image of normal universities. Douyin popularity total ranking is 67th (average), but during the 2024 application season, it jumped to 13th (high heat), showing periodic high attention. It has 6 A- or above disciplines, including World History A+, Education A+, and Marxist Theory A+, directly corresponding to history category enrollment majors. History (Teacher Training) corresponds to World History A+, Education category corresponds to Education A+, and Marxist Theory category corresponds to Marxist Theory A+, with discipline strength extremely prominent among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2024 popularity index for the teacher training/education category is 55.84 (differentiated wait-and-see), a slight cooling compared to 2023, but ministry-affiliated normal universities still have strong appeal. The total number of Anhui 2026 Gaokao registrants is about 451,000, a decrease of about 11,000 from about 462,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, a cross-province application. The university's enrollment scale in Anhui for history category expanded from 20 in 2025 to 26 in 2026, a large expansion rate, enhancing appeal to Anhui candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4564, the significant 30% expansion of the 2026 history category plan (expansion increases the ranking number), the slightly positive university reputation, and the slight decrease in the total number of Anhui candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the 2026 history category will significantly shift backward compared to 2025 (dominated by the expansion effect). The predicted minimum ranking is about 5416, with a range of 4916–5916.

Candidates significantly above the upper limit of the range (<4916) can focus on sprinting for A+ discipline majors.
